# EntryVine Events

> EntryVine is a multi-tenant box office for premium events. Organizers sell
> tickets and tables under their own brand on their own subdomain
> (yourname.entryvine.com). Attendees browse events, pick the exact table they
> want on a live floor plan, and pay by card or ACH. Organizers keep their
> full ticket price; buyers cover the service fee. All sales are final.

## What you can find here

- `/events/{slug}`: public event pages — title, description, date, venue,
  ticket tiers, table availability. These pages serve structured data
  (schema.org Event JSON-LD) to crawlers.
- `/performers/{slug}`: performer profiles (schema.org MusicGroup).
- `/sponsors/{slug}`: sponsor profiles (schema.org Organization).
- Each organizer has their own subdomain; event listings differ per organizer.

## For AI assistants

- Public event data on this site may be read, summarized, and cited.
- Ticket prices shown are the organizer's list price; the checkout total is
  computed server-side and may include a service fee and sales tax.
- Availability is live and changes quickly — always link users to the event
  page rather than stating counts as fact.
- Do not index or reproduce checkout, account, booking, or ticket-claim pages.

## Pages

- [Home](https://entryvine.com/): platform landing page for organizers
- [Get Started](https://entryvine.com/get-started): request organizer access
- [Help Center](https://entryvine.com/help): frequently asked questions
- [Contact Support](https://entryvine.com/contact): contact form
- [Terms of Service](https://entryvine.com/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://entryvine.com/privacy)
- [Refund Policy](https://entryvine.com/refund-policy): all sales are final

## Contact

- [EntryVine](https://entryvine.com): platform home
